targets.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement =~ /^prometheus.*/ and r._field =~ /^sequids_events_total.*/)
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "events_per_sec")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement =~ /^prometheus.*/ and r._field =~ /^sequids_errors_total.*/)
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "errors_per_sec")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement =~ /^prometheus.*/ and r._field =~ /^sequids_events_total.*/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement =~ /^prometheus.*/ and r._field =~ /^sequids_errors_total.*/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_metrics" and r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: false)
  |> mean()

import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "metrics", tag: "device_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "device_metrics", start: -15m)
  |> count()
